subcodes.first_line: O beloved servants and handmaidens of God! In its weakness and frailty, the world of humanity is even as a heap of darksome dust
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان و کنیزان عزیزان الهی عالم انسانی از عجز و ناتوانی خاک سیاه چون ابر
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @spiritual transformation, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
